name: create-account
description: Create a new Convex account with a signing key stored in the peer's signing service. Optionally fund it via faucet. Requires authentication.

arguments.name: passphrase
arguments.description: Passphrase to encrypt the new signing key

arguments.name: faucetAmount
arguments.description: Optional amount of Convex coins to request from faucet (in copper, max 1 CVX = 1000000000)
